title: AI-Powered Cyber Attack Command Center
description: Real-time AI-driven SOC with autonomous threat detection, anomaly scoring, and MCP-powered response automation. This dashboard simulates an intelligent security operations center capable of detecting, explaining, and responding to cyber threats in real time.

viz_actions.description: Tracks automated AI responses such as MFA triggers and account containment.
viz_actions.title: AI Actions Executed Over Time

viz_ai.description: AI-generated threat classification, reasoning, and recommended actions.
viz_ai.title: AI Decision Engine

viz_alert.description: Real-time alert generated by AI when a high-risk attack is detected.
viz_alert.title: Live AI Threat Status

viz_bar.description: Top 15 users/accounts most targeted by high-risk activity.
viz_bar.title: Top Active Threat Targets

viz_map.description: Geographic distribution of detected threats based on attacker origin.
viz_map.title: Global Attack Surface

viz_maxRisk.description: Highest risk score observed in the selected time window.
viz_maxRisk.title: Max Threat Level

viz_table.description: Raw incoming security events being processed by the AI engine.
viz_table.title: Live Threat Feed

viz_timeline.description: Evolution of attack stages over time from reconnaissance to compromise.
viz_timeline.title: Attack Timeline

options.query: index=ai_soc | rex "'risk_score':\s*(?<risk_score>\d+)" | eval risk_score=tonumber(risk_score) | eval action=case(risk_score>=90,"AUTO-CONTAIN",risk_score>=75,"MFA",true(),"NONE") | timechart span=10s count by action

index=ai_soc | rex "'user':\s*'(?<user>[^']+)'" | rex "'event_type':\s*'(?<event_type>[^']+)'" | rex "'risk_score':\s*(?<risk_score>\d+)" | eval risk_score=tonumber(risk_score) | eval threat=case(risk_score>=90,"CRITICAL",risk_score>=75,"HIGH",true(),"NORMAL") | eval decision=case(threat=="CRITICAL","LOCK ACCOUNT",threat=="HIGH","TRIGGER MFA",true(),"MONITOR") | eval reason=case(event_type=="account_locked","Account locked due to high risk",event_type=="impossible_travel","Impossible geo pattern",true(),"Behavior anomaly") | table _time user event_type risk_score threat decision reason

index=ai_soc | rex "'user':\s*'(?<user>[^']+)'" | rex "'event_type':\s*'(?<event_type>[^']+)'" | rex "'risk_score':\s*(?<risk_score>\d+)" | eval risk_score=tonumber(risk_score) | eval alert=if(risk_score>=90,"🚨 CRITICAL: ".user." (".event_type.")","✅ SYSTEM STABLE") | stats last(alert) as alert

index=ai_soc | rex "'user':\s*'(?<user>[^']+)'" | rex "'event_type':\s*'(?<event_type>[^']+)'" | rex "'risk_score':\s*(?<risk_score>\d+)" | rex "'action':\s*'(?<action>[^']+)'" | eval risk_score=tonumber(risk_score) | sort -_time | table _time user event_type risk_score action

index=ai_soc | rex "'user':\s*'(?<user>[^']+)'" | rex "'risk_score':\s*(?<risk_score>\d+)" | eval risk_score=tonumber(risk_score) | where risk_score>=70 | stats count max(risk_score) as peak by user | sort -peak | head 15

index=ai_soc | rex field=_raw "'location':\s*'(?<location>[^']+)'" | eval lat=case(location=="US",37.0902, location=="RU",61.5240, location=="CN",35.8617, location=="IN",20.5937, location=="DE",51.1657, true(), null()) | eval lon=case(location=="US",-95.7129, location=="RU",105.3188, location=="CN",104.1954, location=="IN",78.9629, location=="DE",10.4515, true(), null()) | where isnotnull(lat) AND isnotnull(lon) | geostats count latfield=lat longfield=lon
index=ai_soc | rex "'risk_score':\s*(?<risk_score>\d+)" | eval risk_score=tonumber(risk_score) | stats max(risk_score) as max_risk

index=ai_soc | rex "'risk_score':\s*(?<risk_score>\d+)" | eval risk_score=tonumber(risk_score) | eval stage=case(risk_score>=90,"COMPROMISE",risk_score>=75,"INTRUSION",true(),"RECON") | timechart span=10s count by stage
